name: HR performance review policy example
answer:
Employees receive a performance review every six months.
Employees may request a performance review after 5 years.
Employees receive a guaranteed promotion after each review.

sources.title: HR Performance Review Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive a performance review every six months.
Employees may request a performance review after 1 year.
The company publishes review outcomes within 30 days of the review.
